# 🎤 Artist Overview  
Vozz Rich electrifies the electronic scene with a cross-cultural fusion of Detroit house grit, Latin-inspired rhythms, and big-room energy. The California-based producer/DJ blends underground rave sensibilities with salsa-infused grooves, creating dancefloor anthems that transcend borders. With 10+ releases in 2024 alone, including collaborations with L25 ("Breathless") and remixes for Kelly Reverb & Chad LeMans ("Let This One Ride"), Vozz Rich demonstrates relentless creativity across house and techno subgenres. His work has been praised for bridging organic instrumentation with cutting-edge production.

# 📊 Performance & Draw  
- **25-37K monthly Spotify listeners** (peaking at 37K+ in Nov 2024)  
- **15% Instagram growth** (4,875 engaged followers)  
- **729 LastFM followers** with consistent 3% monthly growth  
- Core fanbase in North American markets, particularly California and Southwest regions  
- SoundCloud plays increasing 22% YoY across original tracks and remixes  

# 🎧 Recent Releases & Press  
**2024 Highlights**  
- "Mi Corazon Batalla" (Top 5 Beatport Latin House chart)  
- Collab EP with L25 featuring standout track "Breathless"  
- "Butterflies" remix for Artsychoke (featured on 15+ curated Spotify dance playlists)  
- Festival-ready banger "House Ablaze" (Dec 2024 release)  
- "Take Off That Noise" featured on SoundCloud's Emerging House Artists rotation  

# 🎪 Stage Experience & Technical  
**Performance Style**  
- Hybrid DJ/live set with MIDI controller integration  
- 2-3 hour energy-building sets adaptable to club/festival environments  
- Signature blend of classic house acapellas with modern basslines  

**Technical Preferences**  
- Pioneer CDJ-3000 + DJM-V10 setup (backline available upon request)  
- Minimum 15K PA system for optimal low-end delivery  
- LED lighting sync capability for visual-enhanced performances
